title: Logical Masking
description: Evaluate the bitwise operation outcome on the target register.

questions.question: What is the final integer value in the low 8 bits of rax (al)?

answer.explanation: rax (0xFF / 11111111) is ANDed with rdx (0x0F / 00001111), resulting in 0x0F (00001111). The NOT operation flips these bits to 11110000, which is 0xF0 or 240 in decimal.
